eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN ADMINISTRATIVE MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Maricopa; Yavapai, AZ; at 08:27 PM ON MAR 28, 2026 Effective until 04:27 AM MAR 29, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: A SAFE Alert has been issued for Yavapai County. This is the Arizona Department of Public Safety. The Prescott Valley Police Department is looking for 58 year old Tracy Foddrill. Tracy was last seen on foot in the area of 4100 North Edith Court wearing a red and white flannel shirt, black pants, and black shoes. If you have contact with this SAFE Alert, please call 911. Monitor TV and Radio for updates.
